tips_en: Start with the Lance paper, since its lightweight unified multimodal design offers the clearest big-picture view of image and video generation and naturally frames the efficiency challenges that LongLive-2.0 tackles. These two papers form a coherent line from multimodal architecture to systems optimization for long-video inference, while the agent-skills governance paper complements them by addressing scalable, reusable capability management in complex AI systems.
tips_zh: 建议从 Lance 读起，其轻量统一的多模态设计为图像与视频生成提供了最清晰的全景视角，也能自然引出 LongLive-2.0 所针对的长视频推理效率问题。这两篇论文串联起从多模态架构到长视频系统优化的完整脉络，而关于 Agent Skill 生命周期治理的论文则通过可复用能力的规模化管控提供了互补视角。
